{{Infobox technique
| name = Path of Celestial Radiance
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Path of Celestial Radiance]] is a path of [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Path of Celestial Radiance]] is a path.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3">''Wintersteel'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sha Siris]] is an [[Underlord]] who likely does not practice the [[Path of Celestial Radiance]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c6">''Wintersteel'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Luminous Queen Sha Leiala,” a woman’s voice said. “Path of Celestial Radiance.”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
